Bash(python -c "
import ctypes, ctypes.wintypes
from ctypes import byref, c_ulong, c_void_p, create_unicode_buffer, POINTER

wsc = ctypes.WinDLL\('winscard'\)
hCtx = c_void_p\(\)
wsc.SCardEstablishContext\(0, None, None, byref\(hCtx\)\)

needed = c_ulong\(0\)
wsc.SCardListReadersW\(hCtx, None, None, byref\(needed\)\)
buf = create_unicode_buffer\(needed.value\)
wsc.SCardListReadersW\(hCtx, None, buf, byref\(needed\)\)
readers = [s for s in buf.value.split\('\\x00'\) if s]
print\('ALL READERS:', readers\)
wsc.SCardReleaseContext\(hCtx\)
" 2>&1)

import re
raw = open\('C:/Windows/System32/drivers/UMDF/NfcCx.dll','rb'\).read\(\)
strings = re.findall\(rb'[\\x20-\\x7E]{8,}', raw\)
decoded = [s.decode\('ascii','replace'\) for s in strings]
src = [s for s in decoded if '.cpp' in s or \('nfc' in s.lower\(\) and '\\\\\\\\' in s\)]
print\('SOURCE PATHS:'\)
for s in src[:30]: print\('  ' + s\)
print\(\)
proto = [s for s in decoded if any\(k in s for k in ['TypeA','TypeB','TypeF','TypeV','NFC-A','NFC-B','NFC-V','NFC-F','T1T','T2T','T3T','T4T','T5T','LLCP','SNEP','HCE','PresenceCheck','Deactivat']\)]
print\('PROTOCOLS SUPPORTED:'\)
for s in proto[:30]: print\('  ' + s\)
" 2>&1)

Bash(python -c "
import re
raw = open\(r'C:/Program Files/ASUS/Armoury Crate Service/SoulKeyServicePlugin/ArmouryCrate.SoulKeyServicePlugin.dll','rb'\).read\(\)
strings = re.findall\(rb'[\\x20-\\x7E]{6,}', raw\)
decoded = [s.decode\('ascii','replace'\) for s in strings]

cats = {
  'scard_calls':  [s for s in decoded if 'SCard' in s or 'SCARD' in s],
  'card_data':    [s for s in decoded if any\(k in s for k in ['UID','uid','ATR','atr','block','Block','read','Read','write','Write','ISO','NFC','nfc','card','Card','key','Key']\)],
  'source_paths': [s for s in decoded if '.cpp' in s or '.h' in s or \('\\\\\\\\' in s and \('nfc' in s.lower\(\) or 'soul' in s.lower\(\) or 'card' in s.lower\(\)\)\)],
  'hid_usage':    [s for s in decoded if 'hid' in s.lower\(\) or 'HID' in s],
  'byte_ops':     [s for s in decoded if any\(k in s for k in ['0xFF','0xCA','0xB0','transmit','Transmit','APDU','apdu']\)],
  'timing':       [s for s in decoded if any\(k in s for k in ['timeout','Timeout','sleep','Sleep','delay','Delay','ms','second']\)],
}

for cat, items in cats.items\(\):
    unique = list\(dict.fromkeys\(items\)\)
    if unique:
        print\(f'\\n[{cat}] \({len\(unique\)}\):'\)
        for s in unique[:20]: print\(f'  {s}'\)
" 2>&1)

import sys

from keystone_nfc.exceptions import KeystoneError, NoReaderError, NoCardError

card = CardInfo.from_raw\(raw, 'Microsoft IFD 0', 2, b'\\x01\\x01\\x01\\x01'\)

print\('Manufacturer:', card.manufacturer\)
print\('Compact UID:', card.uid_compact\)
print\('Block 0:', card.block0.hex\(\)\)
print\(\)
print\(card\)
")
